accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; the observation that no new programs or requirements are created is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated content; all specific references match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies termination of the March 13, 2020 national emergency via Proclamation 9994.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes that it operates under section 202 of the National Emergencies Act to end the emergency.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this bill.

effective_dates.why: States the approval date of April 10, 2023.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the sole operative provision; also accurately notes what the resolution does not do.

concise.why: No padding; efficiently covers the bill's content.

correct_entities.why: National Emergencies Act section 202, Proclamation 9994, and Fed. Reg. citation are all correct.

correct_figures.why: 85 Federal Register 15337 and April 10, 2023 are both accurate.
